failure_movement.justification: unknown 52->34 (-18): predicted shrink 8-15, right direction, slightly under magnitude. empty 12->7: right direction but wrong premise (~25) and missed <5 target. wrong 9->10: said stable, held. Solid on direction, weak on magnitudes.
